content:
# Session 16 (iter-016) — review summary

## Metadata
- Sorry count (SGR.lean decls with sorry): **6 → 6** (no regression). Sorry tokens: 7 (★, B6×2, B7, comm×3).
- Target attempted: ★ `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf` (the directive's CHURNING-corrective DECOMPOSE, hard-stop armed).
- Net: **★'s abstract math content fully PROVEN + axiom-clean** (7 new lemmas); ★ itself still `sorry` — placement intractable; **ESCALATED**.
- Build: GREEN (`lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.SectionGradedRing` → "Build completed successfully (2439 jobs)").
- Goal seed `Grassmannian.represents`: untouched, DELIVERED.

## What landed
The prover executed the DECOMPOSE corrective. `lean_goal` at ★'s residual `sorry` exposed the genuine
associator-naturality coherence — LHS `(α_ A B C).hom` on the sheaves vs RHS `(α_ LA LB LC).hom` on the
sheafified presheaves, conjugated by counit isos `εc A/B/C` + the `μ` comparison isos, with a leading
`μ`-pair (`n`) inside a counit (`eF`) whiskering. He extracted it as a **generic `[MonoidalCategory M]`
coherence** (uniform comp instance, NO `LocalizedMonoidal`/`X.Modules` diamond) and proved it:

- `tensorObjAssoc_associator_counit_coherence` (~L2543, `set_option maxHeartbeats 800000`) — PROVEN.
  `lean_verify` = `[propext, Quot.sound]` (review-confirmed, no `sorryAx`).
- 6 staged axiom-clean helpers: `neF_prefix_id`, `counit_assoc_tail_id`,
  `tensorObjAssoc_associator_counit_coherence_tail`, `…_stage0`, `…_stage1`, `…_stage2`.

Mechanism (all verified): cancel `n`/`eF` round-trips → `comp_whiskerRight`/`whiskerLeft_comp` expand →
`whisker_exchange_assoc` reorder → 3× whiskered `associator_naturality_{left,middle,right}_assoc` (push
`α` to the front) → cancel `eA`/`eB`/`eC` round-trips (`hom_inv_whiskerRight`/`whiskerLeft_comp`/`Iso.hom_inv_id`).

### Key engineering findings (reusable)
- On abstract monoidal terms EVERY whole-term op is heavy: one `simp` scan ≈ one `isDefEq` ≈ one
  `kabstract` ≈ 150k–800k+ heartbeats. The proof MUST be **staged across many small declarations**, each
  one `simp` pass + one cheap handoff `exact`, so each fits a single 200k budget.
- `subst hm6` is heartbeat-pathological here (its `kabstract` motive over the big goal alone >200k) —
  replace with a `congrArg`/term-mode chain folding the hypothesis.
- `maxHeartbeats 800000` on the main coherence is the genuine elaboration cost of its single full-term
  `isDefEq` (matches the file's pre-existing 800000 at L1194); NOT 1e6, NOT papering over a gap — the
  proof is complete and axiom-clean (lean-auditor confirmed the budget is justified).

## The blocker (precise — this is the escalation)
★'s residual IS exactly `tensorObjAssoc_associator_counit_coherence` (now proven). The intended closer
`exact tensorObjAssoc_associator_counit_coherence _ … (sheafification_map_unit_eq _)` is VERIFIED to
close the goal — **but** the bridging `isDefEq` reconciling the `LocalizedMonoidal` /
`Scheme.Modules.instCategory` comp-instance diamond on the ~1.2M-char **concrete** monoidal term does
**not terminate within 4,000,000 heartbeats** (authoritative `lake build`). Every closer hits the same
term-size + diamond wall, independently re-confirmed this iter:
- `exact <abstract helper>`: diamond `isDefEq` >4M heartbeats.
- ordered/bounded `erw` (iter-015 plan): each step is a cross-diamond `kabstract` on the 1.2M-char goal;
  even one `simp only [Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]` over the smaller *abstract* term already >200k.
- positional `simp`/`rw`: no-match across the diamond (instances `rfl`-defeq but syntactically distinct).
- `subst`/`conv … rw`: `kabstract` motive over the full term itself >200k.

The obstruction is **no longer mathematical** (coherence proven, axiom-clean) — pure term-size + the
comp-instance diamond. No autonomous mechanical variant remains within budget. This is the iter-015
hard-stop escalation condition, reached with a concrete verified blocker.

## Verification (both highly-recommended subagents dispatched — prover touched the file)
- **lean-auditor** `iter016` (PASS; 0 must-fix / 2 major / 3 minor): 7 new lemmas all axiom-clean,
  strictly-linear helper chain (no circularity), all 7 sorries honestly typed (no statement weakening),
  `maxHeartbeats 800000` JUSTIFIED. 2 majors = STALE comments (SGR L731–783 calls `relTensorActL/R/Proj`
  "DEFERRED/BLOCKED" when they're proved above; `RelativeSpec.lean` header says "5 sorry bodies" when all
  6 pinned decls have genuine proofs) → recommendations (review can't edit `.lean`). Report:
  `task_results/lean-auditor-iter016.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `iter016` (1 must-fix / 2 major / 1 minor): Lean faithfully follows the
  chapter; ★ carries NO false `\leanok` (confirmed `sorryAx`). Must-fix = the `sync_leanok` over-strip
  (21 axiom-clean proof blocks wrongly unmarked) → RESTORED (below). Report:
  `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter016.md`.

## sync_leanok over-strip ANOMALY (3rd consecutive iter) + manual override
`sync_leanok-state.json` (iter 16, sha ed42fe3): removed **22** proof-block `\leanok`, added 0 — chapter
dropped to ZERO proof-block markers. The lean-vs-blueprint-checker independently `lean_verify`'d every
`\lean{}` decl and found **21** of the 22 are CLOSED + axiom-clean (`[propext, Classical.choice,
Quot.sound]`, no `sorryAx`); the prover added no sorries to any closed proof this iter, so the strip is
the recurring sync defect (`sync-leanok-overstrip` memory), not a regression. **I restored those 21
proof-block `\leanok`** (override justified below). The 22nd removed marker (`sectionMul_coherent`
multi-decl block, tex L2138) was **correctly** removed and NOT restored — two of its four members
(`sectionsMul_mul_assoc`, `sectionsMul_mul_comm`) carry `sorryAx`. Recurring-tooling block surfaced to
user (TO_USER); durable fix is sync-side, manual restore is otherwise pure churn.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`: **restored 21 proof-block `\leanok`** (sync over-strip override;
  each `lean_verify`-confirmed axiom-clean). Decls/tex-`\begin{proof}` lines:
  `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit` L405, `W_isMonoidal` L617, `monoidalCategory` L663,
  `tensorObjAssoc` L749, `tensorObjRightUnitor_eq` L839, `tensorObjUnitIso_eq` L875, `tensorBraiding_eq`
  L910, `tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso_eq` L944, `tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_eq` L976, `tensorPowAdd` L1019,
  `canonical_runit_core` L1162, `tensorPowAdd_zero_right` L1196, `tensorObjUnitIso_hom_sectionsMul`
  L1478, `tensorObjRightUnitor_hom_sectionsMul` L1513, `tensorBraiding_hom_sectionsMul` L1543,
  `sectionsMul_whiskerRight_unit` L1619, `sectionsMul_whiskerLeft_unit` L1678, `presheafAssociator_top_apply`
  L1713, `sheafification_map_unit_eq` L1804, `sectionsCast_refl` L1996, `gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast` L2021.
  (tex lines are pre-restore; insertions shifted later lines downward.)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `cor:sheafModule_braided_symmetric`: added statement `\leanok`
  (`braidedCategory`/`symmetricCategory` both exist + axiom-clean, `lean_verify`-confirmed; sync skipped
  the multi-`\lean{}` corollary).
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:sectionGradedRing_gsemiring` / `_gcommSemiring` /
  `lem:sectionGradedModule_gmodule`: added `% NOTE:` — their `\lean{}` targets are unscaffolded (decls
  do not yet exist in SGR.lean; `lean_verify` → "Unknown constant"). Dangling hints that trip
  doctor/sync; planner should scaffold sorry-bodied stubs or the planner-side dag will keep flagging.

## Notes (LOW)
- lean-auditor minor: `instGMulNatSectionDeg`/`instGOneNatSectionDeg` clean but lack statement `\leanok`
  (sync skips no-proof-block defs) — left for sync/planner; not overridden (low value, statement-side).
- Blueprint-doctor: all findings in DEFERRED out-of-cone chapters (Cohomology_FlatBaseChange covers 2
  non-existent files; broken `\ref`/`\cref`/`\uses` in FlatBaseChange/GlueDescent/QuotScheme) —
  inherited extraction artifacts, resolve at merge-back (unchanged from prior iters).
